overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player walks past the 'Brayside Cachet' building with its glowing signage, continues along streets lined with towering digital billboards, crosses wet asphalt roads with futuristic vehicles passing by, and explores a large open plaza featuring a medical center and multi-level highway structures.

events.description: black van drives past on the wet street reflecting neon lights
Brayside Cachet neon sign shifts from pink to cyan color

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside the Brayside Cachet building, observing passing traffic and neon reflections on the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: black van driving along the wet road with headlights illuminating the rain
figure standing near the building entrance under the neon sign

entered.detail: commercial building with large illuminated sign reading BRAYSIDE CACHET in pink and cyan neon letters
rain-soaked street reflecting pink and cyan neon lights from surrounding signs
elevated walkway with purple neon lighting structure spanning the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk street at night, with the Brayside Cachet building dominating the right side with its large neon signage. The player walks along the wet sidewalk as a black van passes by on the reflective asphalt road. The neon sign cycles through colors, casting shifting pink and cyan reflections on the rain-soaked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with towering vertical digital billboards

events.description: red sports car speeds past on the left side of the street
character begins crossing the street toward the open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking along the billboard-lined canyon street and initiating a crossing maneuver toward the plaza

notable_agents.action: red sports car speeding down the wet street with motion blur
pedestrian with glowing elements walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall building facades covered with large glowing advertisements and holographic displays showing various products
tall poles with horizontal fluorescent light bars illuminating the street below

segments.scene_description: Moving past the Brayside Cachet building, the scene transitions to a narrow street canyon lined with towering digital billboards on the left. The player walks past street light poles as a red sports car speeds by. The environment feels enclosed by tall buildings covered in glowing advertisements. Near the end of the segment, the player begins crossing the street toward a more open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban plaza with medical center and multi-level traffic infrastructure

events.description: entering the open plaza area with the medical center building visible on the left
white sports car drives through the intersection ahead of the player

agents.ego_description: walking through the expansive plaza toward the intersection, navigating around light poles and observing the surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving through the crosswalk intersection with headlights on
pedestrian walking ahead toward the intersection crossing

entered.detail: building with large green neon MEDICAL sign and illuminated cross symbol on the facade
elevated multi-level highway or monorail track with vehicles passing above the plaza
tall cylindrical poles with horizontal lighting arrays illuminating the open area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban plaza featuring a medical center with a prominent green neon sign on the left. The player walks across the expansive open area toward a large intersection, passing cylindrical light poles. Above, an elevated highway structure carries traffic across the plaza. A white sports car drives through the intersection as the player approaches the crosswalk, with the environment feeling more open compared to the previous enclosed street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk district that transitions from a neon-lit storefront into a claustrophobic street canyon before opening into a vast urban plaza. It begins on a wet sidewalk beside the Brayside Cachet building, where cycling pink and cyan neon signs cast shifting reflections on the asphalt as a black van passes by. As the camera moves forward, the environment tightens into a narrow canyon of towering digital billboards and glowing advertisements, with a red sports car speeding past the player. The scene then expands as the player crosses the street, shifting from the enclosed corridor into a wide plaza dominated by a medical center with a prominent green neon sign. Finally, the camera advances across the expansive open area toward a large intersection, passing under an elevated highway structure as a white sports car drives through the rain.
